title: Medication review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

medication.text: Supports complete and accurate medicine information, prescribed and non-prescribed medicines, allergies, timing, monitoring, and discussion at care transitions.
medication.rationale: Supports accurate medicine details, monitoring, and communication at care transitions; no broad legacy field is mapped solely to this section.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports complete and accurate medicine information, prescribed and non-prescribed medicines, allergies, timing, monitoring, and discussion at care transitions.

source.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations

medication.text: Defines reconciliation as identifying an accurate current medicine list, comparing records, recognising discrepancies, documenting changes, and including over-the-counter or complementary medicines.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped medicine-list, prior-prescription, reconciliation, discrepancy, and record fields in qualified reconciliation contexts.
medication.evidence_extract: Defines reconciliation as identifying an accurate current medicine list, comparing records, recognising discrepancies, documenting changes, and including over-the-counter or complementary medicines.

source.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations

medication.text: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped medicine-list, adherence, side-effect, monitoring, concern, discussion, advice-seeking, and structured-review documentation without medicine changes or doses.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.

source.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations

sources_used.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations
sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE medicines, prescribing, pharmacy, discharge, and information-governance adaptation

source_limitations: General vitals, abnormal-result red flags, previous-prescription wording outside transfer or reconciliation, generic referral, generic follow-up, fixed intervals, broad return-precaution wording, and the combined history draft remain partly or wholly unsupported.
The workflow does not encode a clear review purpose, polypharmacy, care transition, age, chronic condition, adverse-reaction, or monitoring qualifier.
Medicine selection, starting, stopping, changing, dose, treatment, referral, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
